first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (3/10), and the core reasoning remains unchanged between the two evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the same key gaps in the candidate's profile: insufficient C++ experience, a lack of Windows-platform work, no SQL Server/Oracle skills, and no capital markets domain exposure. The differences in phrasing are minor stylistic variations and reordering of points, which fall well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise. No new concerns or logic shifts are introduced due to the change in location from Berlin to Lagos.
